proposals.reason: New guidance clarifies UDI-DI attribution between manufacturers and distributors, resolving frequent ambiguity ahead of Q3 EUDAMED submissions.

card.x: Specifies when distributors must obtain their own UDI-DI versus retaining the manufacturer's, especially for repackaging/relabelling.

proposals.reason: MDCG 2026-4 finalizes that manufacturers must upload all SSP/SSCP summaries in EUDAMED, reversing previous NB involvement.

card.t: MDCG 2026-4: Manufacturers Upload All SSP/SSCP Summaries
card.x: All SSP and SSCP summaries must now be uploaded by manufacturers, regardless of certification type, to accelerate EUDAMED compliance.

proposals.reason: New harmonised MDR standards published (biocompatibility, sterilization), presuming conformity with essential requirements.

card.x: Expands the list of harmonised standards for biocompatibility and sterilization, facilitating presumption of conformity.

proposals.reason: ENISA report analyzes current SBOM practices and identifies obstacles, recommending harmonization (SPDX, CycloneDX) for NIS2/MDR compliance.

card.t: ENISA: SBOM and Medical Device Cybersecurity Report
card.x: Recommends harmonized SBOM formats and integration into technical documentation ahead of MDCG 2019-16 cybersecurity revisions.

proposals.reason: MDR modification exempts certain low-risk implantable devices from disproportionate administrative burdens (articles 52.4 and 61.6).

card.t: MDR Exemptions for Certain Implantable Devices (Art. 52.4, 61.6)
card.x: Exempts low-risk implantables (e.g., sutures, dental implants) from certain requirements; verify eligibility before Q3 EUDAMED submissions.

proposals.reason: IMDRF's first annual MDSAP 2025 report consolidates audit experience and identifies frequent gaps (risk management, software validation).

card.x: First annual report identifies common audit gaps (risk management, software validation) useful for multi-jurisdictional market access.

proposals.reason: Transition from 'EC REP' to 'EU REP' symbol (MDCG 2021-5 Annex published 18 Jun) must be completed on all labelling by this date.

card.t: 'EC REP' to 'EU REP' Symbol Transition Deadline
card.x: All labelling must display 'EU REP' instead of 'EC REP' for authorised representatives by year-end 2026.
